info.name: NearProp Developer Collection
info.description: A comprehensive collection of APIs for Developer role in NearProp application

request.description: Login to the NearProp platform as a Developer
Request Developer role in the NearProp platform
Verify email with OTP
Get all role requests made by the current user

body.raw:
{
    "title": "Modern Apartment Complex",
    "description": "Luxury apartments with modern amenities",
    "propertyType": "APARTMENT",
    "price": 25000000,
    "area": 10000,
    "bedrooms": 3,
    "bathrooms": 2,
    "address": {
        "addressLine1": "123 Main Street",
        "addressLine2": "Building A",
        "city": "Mumbai",
        "state": "Maharashtra",
        "district": "Mumbai Suburban",
        "postalCode": "400001",
        "latitude": 19.0760,
        "longitude": 72.8777
    },
    "amenities": ["SWIMMING_POOL", "GYM", "SECURITY", "PARKING"],
    "images": ["https://example.com/image1.jpg", "https://example.com/image2.jpg"],
    "status": "AVAILABLE",
    "isNew": true,
    "constructionStatus": "UNDER_CONSTRUCTION",
    "completionDate": "2025-12-31",
    "possessionDate": "2026-03-31",
    "totalUnits": 100,
    "availableUnits": 75,
    "pricePerSqFt": 2500,
    "maintenanceCharges": 5000,
    "maintenancePeriod": "MONTHLY",
    "propertyTaxes": 50000,
    "projectName": "Green Valley Heights",
    "developerName": "My Development Company",
    "reraRegistrationNumber": "ABC123XYZ",
    "legalClearance": true,
    "legalDocuments": ["https://example.com/legal1.pdf", "https://example.com/legal2.pdf"]
}
